serp_results.title: What Is Revenue Operations? The Complete Guide — Salesforce
serp_results.description: Revenue operations (RevOps) aligns sales, marketing, and customer success around shared data, processes, and goals. Learn how to build a RevOps function.

serp_results.title: Revenue Operations: The Ultimate Guide to RevOps — Clari
serp_results.description: Everything you need to know about building a world-class revenue operations function, including team structure, tech stack, and KPIs.

serp_results.title: Revenue Operations Strategy and Best Practices — Gartner
serp_results.description: Gartner research on revenue operations: how leading companies are structuring RevOps teams to drive predictable growth.

serp_results.title: Revenue Operations Software — HubSpot
serp_results.description: HubSpot's RevOps tools help you align your teams, automate processes, and get a single view of your revenue pipeline.

serp_results.title: What Is RevOps? A Plain-English Explainer — RevOps Co-op
serp_results.description: RevOps is more than a job title. Here's what it actually means to build a revenue operations function and why it matters for B2B growth.

paa_questions: What does a revenue operations team do?
What is the difference between RevOps and sales ops?
How do you structure a RevOps team?
What tools do revenue operations teams use?
Is RevOps the same as business operations?
content_gaps: No content covering RevOps for mid-market specifically
Lack of ROI and business case content for RevOps investment
Missing comparison of build vs buy for RevOps tooling
No coverage of RevOps team structure at Series B stage
